name: Micdalia "Miki" Rosario
ai_summary: Micdalia "Miki" Rosario has over ten years of diverse childcare experience across multiple settings and currently misses working with children. She is based in (likely) Haralsburg, GA with a 20-mile travel radius, available flexibly Mondays and Thursdays, and uses empathetic listening and separation to resolve conflicts.
